nasb.text: And Hiram sent his servants with the fleet, sailors who knew the sea, along with the servants of Solomon.

esv.text: And Hiram sent with the fleet his servants, seamen who were familiar with the sea, together with the servants of Solomon.

cnv.text: 希蘭派遣他船隊的僕人，就是熟悉航海的船員，與所羅門的僕人一同航海。

ccb.text: 希兰派有经验的水手与所罗门的水手一起出海，
